explanation: Substitution of the equals sign (=) in place of a space for the --Module argument, which is still valid in some command-line interpreters.
Substitution of the equals sign (=) in place of a space for the --IPCport argument.
Reordering of the --IPCport and --Module arguments, which may be accepted by the application.
Substitution of a single hyphen (-) in place of double hyphen (--) for the Module flag.
Original command line provided for comparison and testing purposes.
